title: Continuous Mining Machine Operators
description: Operate self-propelled mining machines that rip coal, metal and nonmetal ores, rock, stone, or sand from the mine face and load it onto conveyors, shuttle cars, or trucks in a continuous operation.

tasks.text: Hang ventilation tubing and ventilation curtains to ensure that the mining face area is kept properly ventilated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct methane gas checks to ensure breathing quality of air.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check the stability of roof and rib support systems before mining face areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate mining machines to gather coal and convey it to floors or shuttle cars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive machines into position at working faces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move controls to start and regulate movement of conveyors and to start and position drill cutters or torches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reposition machines to make additional holes or cuts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine locations, boundaries, and depths of holes or channels to be cut.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and listen to equipment operation to detect binding or stoppage of tools or other equipment malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair, oil, and adjust machines, and change cutting teeth, using wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrape or wash conveyors, using belt scrapers or belt washers, to minimize dust production.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move levers to raise and lower hydraulic safety bars supporting roofs above machines until other workers complete framing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply new technologies developed to minimize the environmental impact of coal mining.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide and assist crews laying track and resetting supports and blocking.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
